What we supply

Hundreds of brands.
One supplier.

A sample of what we source: engines, pumps, navigation, sensors, electrical, and auxiliary equipment. If it's a maritime or industrial part, we can find it.

Request parts

Engine parts

Two- and four-stroke engine spares – pistons, liners, bearings, fuel injection components, turbochargers, gaskets, seals, valve gear, fuel pumps, and overhaul kits.

Two-stroke engines

MAN B&W Wärtsilä Sulzer Pielstick Mitsubishi Hyundai Kawasaki

Four-stroke engines

Wärtsilä Volvo Penta Deutz MTU MAK Yanmar Caterpillar Daihatsu Cummins Niigata Perkins Bergen

Pumps & valves

Coverage includes bilge, ballast, fire, fuel, cooling water, cargo, and sanitary systems.

Pumps

Desmi Allweiler Bornemann Speck Wilden Azcue IMO Trik Prinz KSB Sulzer Grundfos

Valves

PTFE-lined Butterfly Globe Non-return Gate Quick-closing

Navigation & comms

We supply both new units and spare parts for existing installed systems.

Brands

Sperry Transas Tokyo-Keiki Raytheon-Anschutz Furuno Raymarine Thales Garmin Hatteland Jotron JRC Cobham

Equipment

Gyrocompass Radar Magnetron Displays BNWAS ECDIS GMDSS

Sensors & solenoids

Pressure, temperature, flow, and level sensors; solenoid valves; switches for engine and automation systems.

Brands

ABB Novatech Danfoss Deckma AEM AMOT Clippard Rotex Noris Hydac Krohne Emerson ATMOS ASCO Eaton Kelco Fuji Honeywell Endress+Hauser Pixsys MMC STS Parker Hannifin Magnatrol

Electrical

Marine-grade electrical components for power generation, distribution, and automation.

Brands

Leroy Somer Stamford Weidmuller Phoenix Contact Schneider Siemens Kohler Omron ABB RS Pro Releco WEG WAGO YASA

Components

Motors Alternators Relays Contactors Breakers Cables Tools

Auxiliary equipment

Purifiers, compressors, boilers, coolers, filtration, sewage treatment.

Brands

Alfa Laval GEA Westfalia Atlas Copco Ingersoll Rand Boll & Kirch Clayton Johnson Controls Sperre BAUER Jets Sauer Kelvion Evac Miura

Equipment

Purifiers Compressors Coolers Boilers Filtration Sewage treatment plants

ASIL TRADING

We source and deliver maritime and industrial spare parts globally. Engine components, pumps, navigation equipment, sensors, electrical, and auxiliary equipment. Emergency timelines and obsolete items handled.
